docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYSON, JUAN $7,345.07 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,345.07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-24-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRYSON, JUAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYSON, JUAN $3,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,740.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,560.07 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BRYSON, JUAN
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT BRYSON, JUAN NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONA;D MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,171.33 ACCRUED INTEREST, $150.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,650.00 FILED BY TAN, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT BRYSON, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
